code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur: Int = 0
mut has: Bool = false
mut neg: Bool = false
mut i: Int = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      if neg
        nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
      else
        nums = list.push(nums, cur)
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    neg = true
    has = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  if neg
    nums = list.push(nums, -cur)
  else
    nums = list.push(nums, cur)
  end
end

let total = nums.len()
mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut best: Int = 0
mut j: Int = 0
while j < total
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    best = v
  else
    if v > best
      best = v
    end
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, best)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out: String = ""
mut k: Int = 0
while k < total
  let v = match maxes.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
